name: Improper Null Termination
description: The product does not terminate or incorrectly terminates a string or array with a null character, causing subsequent string operations to read past the intended boundary, potentially leaking adjacent memory contents or causing buffer overflows.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[string_operation] (strncpy, snprintf, read) writes to STORAGE[buffer] but does not ensure the result is null-terminated when the source data fills the entire buffer, causing downstream TRANSFORM[strlen|strcpy|printf] to read past the buffer end without a CONTROL[null_termination_check]
